title: hymenoxys brandegeei
intro: Hymenoxys brandegeei, also known as Brandegee's gilia, is a rare species of flowering plant in the phlox family. It is native to the southwestern United States and Baja California in Mexico, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential remedy for minor cuts and scrapes. Herbal preparations of Hymenoxys brandegeei can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
